description_long: This kiosk features a modern, streamlined design with a predominantly white and blue color scheme. The structure has a partially open front with a curved canopy and integrated signage above the main counter, displaying various icons and a central logo. The left side includes a semi-enclosed seating or service area, while the right side is more enclosed with a smooth, continuous wall. The roof is flat with a raised frame and decorative cutouts, providing both shade and visual interest. The kiosk is constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with smooth, hard surfaces and a sleek, contemporary appearance. Prominent branding and institutional logos are visible on the front, making it suitable for use as an information booth or service point in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern kiosk with a curved canopy, open front counter, and prominent signage in white and blue. Features a flat roof, semi-enclosed service area, and bold institutional branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved blue wall and the layered roof structure, with the open front partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open counter, integrated signage with icons and logos, and the main entrance area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth, continuous wall and the depth of the kiosk's interior space.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a solid, unadorned wall and the flat roof with its raised frame.
attribute_signage_type: Printed and logo signage integrated above the entrance and on the front counter, featuring icons, text ('SMKN4 TAFU'), and an institutional emblem.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open archway at the front
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with a raised frame, decorative cutouts, and slight overhang; appears to be made of metal or plastic.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with minimalist and institutional influences
